description: CIEL concept mappings for primary care voice form filling in OpenMRS-based clinics across Africa
_note: DERIVED ARTIFACT — authoritative source is dataset/CEIL_speech_dataset/ciel_dictionary/. This copy is optimized for runtime lookup. Do not edit directly; regenerate from source.

diagnoses.description: Common diagnoses in African primary care settings

medications.description: Common medications in African primary care formulary

procedures.description: Common clinical procedures in primary care

notes: UUIDs are illustrative; actual UUIDs should be sourced from the target OpenMRS instance CIEL dictionary.
Synonyms include informal and spoken forms to support voice-based data entry.
Concept IDs are based on the CIEL dictionary (Columbia International eHealth Laboratory).
Range values for vitals are general adult reference ranges; pediatric ranges may differ.
Drug concepts reference the generic formulation; brand names are locale-specific.
ICD-10 codes are mapped to the primary/unspecified code for each diagnosis.
This mapping file is intended for use with speech-to-text clinical documentation in resource-limited settings.
